name: My hearing claim denied saying pre-existing—had mild loss before job, what to do?
description: Prove job aggravated it—new expert opinion needed for appeal.[3]

mainEntity.name: My hearing claim denied saying pre-existing—had mild loss before job, what to do?

acceptedAnswer.text: Prove job aggravated it—new expert opinion needed for appeal.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Prove aggravation by work noise counts as compensable; get expert to apportion job contribution.[3] Idaho/Utah allow if employment substantially caused worsening.[1][3] Key factors: Compare pre/post audiograms, noise type matches pattern.[3] Challenge with new opinion, appeal denial.[3][5] Lawyer argues cumulative trauma.[1]
